# Zapply Jobs — New Grad Jobs 2026

> Curated entry-level and new graduate job listings across tech, finance, healthcare, hardware, data science, and more. Updated every 15 minutes. US-focused.

## What this repo provides
- 24,000+ entry-level job listings updated every 15 minutes
- Jobs from 500+ companies across 9 ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Workday, Ashby, Lever, SmartRecruiters, Amazon, JSearch, Netflix, Eightfold)
- Structured data: title, company, location, apply URL, domain tags, employment type
- Enriched data: required skills, visa sponsorship, education requirements, summary
- US-only, entry-level only (senior roles filtered out)

## How to use this data
- Browse the README table for quick job listings
- Use `all_jobs.json` (JSONL format) for programmatic access
- Use `enriched_jobs.json` for skills/visa/education data
- Use `descriptions-*.jsonl` files for full job descriptions
- All files at `.github/data/` directory

## Related repos
- Internships: github.com/zapplyjobs/Internships-2026
- Software Engineering: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Software-Engineering-Jobs-2026
- Data Science: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Data-Science-Jobs-2026
- Hardware Engineering: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Hardware-Engineering-Jobs-2026
- Healthcare: github.com/zapplyjobs/New-Grad-Healthcare-Jobs-2026

## Who maintains this
Zapply Jobs (zapplyjobs) — automated pipeline with human curation
